feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP SD LE-TRA Pricing procedure - Functional consultant responsible
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Please clear my doubts.
LE-TRA Standard Pricing procedure SDFC00, Condition type FB00, Access sequence, Condition table creation and Maintaining condition Master records TK11
Who  is responsible? SD or MM Functional consultant
Copy Service Purchase Order amount (Price +Tax) to SD Condition type HD00?
What are the Configuration setting(s). The reason is what ever the Transportation charges paid to Service Agent (Vendor) to be collected from Customer.
LE-TRA to SAP Imbedded TM 20XX release?
Is it possible to Transfer Transactional data from LE-TRA to SAP Imbedded TM
Please find the attachment.
Regards

entry.title: Trigger Sloc to Sloc Transfer from Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the following business scenario:

We have a single plant with two WM-managed storage locations: WH1-SLC1 and WH2-SLC2 that are located in close proximity.  The business would like to fulfill all orders out of WH1 when there is a mix of items from WH1 and WH2.  I am looking for a way to trigger some type of replenishment request or transfer requirement or STO when the order is created to move the material from WH2 to WH1.  Once the material is transferred to WH1, the warehouse team will then create the delivery and pick from WH1. 

Can anyone provide some guidance on the best path forward and the steps to accomplish this?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: way to Limit Material delivery by state
entry.content:
Hello,


I have order coming in through EDI. i want to save sales order but want to block ship to party (by State) for particular material. I tried VB01 (B001) but it is not allowing to save sales order. (VA01) it only shows material exclusion error. i want sales order to block not fail

If I have EDI orders (Z***) coming in, I cannot have the sales order not come into SAP, it has to come in with a  block for Material not allowed to ship

I also have sales order type activated for material exclusion.

Please advise if there is a way.

entry.title: Where does Price Variable come from in the Optimum Dynamic Lot sizing Config
entry.content:
Curious as to where the price for the optimum dynamic lot sizing equation comes from. Is this pulled from the material master?

 

Thanks,

Scott

entry.title: Restocking fee for returning the product to supplier
entry.content:
Hello,

the scenario is that we need to return the product to supplier as we ordered wrong product, its goods receipt, invoice and payment had been posted in SAP, supplier is going to charge us the restocking fee when we requested the return. my questions are: 1. how do we handle this returning process with restocking fee? 2. how do we receive the replaced product if we need the product to be replaced in SAP? thanks,

entry.title: Career Guide
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is Goku, and I am a Supply Chain and Operations management student. I have over year of internship experience working as Production Coordinator in a Aerospace Industry. I have learning Business process and little bit of end user experience in SAP Production Planning. Currently I am 3rd year of my college and I am learing advanced business process in SAP. As of now, I found out that I am interested in SAP and consulting sounds interesting to me what I have researched so far. I need help with finding good course or how can I start my career in SAP functional consulting? Please if you have any hints or guidance would be helpful. I googled how to become a SAP Functional consutant, and most the finding I got was need degree in IT and related field. 

It would be helpful if someone provide with certification information or how to become a SAP consultant? 

I found the course below in SAP certification website but I am not sure if it will be useful or not? Please guide! 

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-business-process-integration-with-sap-s-4hana

entry.title: Career Guidance!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is Goku, and I am a Supply Chain and Operations management student. I have over year of internship experience working as Production Coordinator in a Aerospace Industry. I have learning Business process and little bit of end user experience in SAP Production Planning. Currently I am 3rd year of my college and I am learing advanced business process in SAP. As of now, I found out that I am interested in SAP and consulting sounds interesting to me what I have researched so far. I need help with finding good course or how can I start my career in SAP functional consulting? Please if you have any hints or guidance would be helpful. I googled how to become a SAP Functional consutant, and most the finding I got was need degree in IT and related field. 

It would be helpful if someone provide with certification information or how to become a SAP consultant? 

I found the course below in SAP certification website but I am not sure if it will be useful or not? Please guide! 

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-business-process-integration-with-sap-s-4hana

entry.title: Cadeia de suprimentos
entry.content:
This Record of Achievement verifies that the learner has completed the SAP learning journey "Applying Supply Chain Execution in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition" and passed all the quiz questions on the SAP learning site. The learner can understand Supply Chain Execution processes, execute a Supply Chain Execution inbound process, and execute a Supply Chain Execution outbound process.
View my verified achievement from Sap.

entry.title: Freight Request for Tendering for Ocean & Air .
entry.content:
Freight Request for Tendering for Ocean and Air : BN4L does not offer tendering for Ocean and Air.

What options can be considered to use Tender and also continue the Air/ Ocean booking via Freight Booking. If there's a process guidance, please share the steps by step process creating tendering, then convert the same into a Freight booking manually or through a custom-built mechanism and proceed with the booking request.

entry.title: SAP ePPDS - Max orders quantity per Product
entry.content:
Let's start confessing I'ma newbie to S4HANA PPDS, but ...
I've been told there is a maximum number of planned orders per location product that is max 500 orders.
Seems that after 500 orders that ePPDS stops generating orders.

Can this be reconfigured somehow, and why is this even existing?
Is it just defaulted at 500 due to some reason?
Do someone have experience with this limit or have successfully changed it. How high, and are there any risks?

Some background to my question:
Due to this constraint, and the fact we try to have a 1 year planning in PPDS, we are currently aggregating the orders by a 3 level horizon (daily, weekly, monthly).
And the aggregation itself is causing other problems for the supply chain.
So, I'd thought it would be nice to have daily orders for 365 days...

entry.title: How to see Packing Instruction POP2 Change History
entry.content:
Hi 

I am check Packing Instruction in POP2. It seems  target quantity has been changed. We need to identify it what value was changed. As it is new material so We dont have existing data for it.  we can see last change date and user but can not see the list

Could you advise how to see change history in POP2 for value

 

Regards

RK

entry.title: Single IBD for Multiple PO with HU by IDoC DELVRY07
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Business has a requirement, where in the single inbound ASN IDoC DESADV (Basic type DELVRY07), multiple PO details in the E1EDL41-BSTNR will be send and for those PO, IBD should get posted. This scenario is working , but when we add HU details in the E1EDL37 (single or Multiple HU) for PO line items, we are getting below 3 error messages, 

-Packing not possible since there is no quantity to be packed

-Error while generating packaging data

-Delivery item cannot be exactly determined

Has any one come across such issues and if yes, how it's fixed. Can you please let us know.

Thank you.

entry.title: PAL change documents functionality in 1909 version
entry.content:
As per the note 2691783 - FAQ: Product Allocation Check (PAL) with aATP the PAL change documents functionality will be provided with OP2023. Seems like due to the high technically complexity the functionality cannot be down ported to lower product versions.

As we are using S/4 HANA 1909 version, please do let  us know, if there are any other alternative approaches in retrieving the change logs.

entry.title: Incremental price based on miles
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement where i should do a incremental price condition type with miles in Public Cloud. Our client have a product called mobilization. The requirement is to have a price from 0-50 & 51-100 & 101-200 in miles.

i tried to create a condition type with scales with fixed value. say 0-50 for 1000 usd, 51-100 for 2000 usd, 101-200 for 3000 usd. But the scale is not accepting the given values. and to have +5% for few customers.

Please suggest How can i do this in public cloud.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Need to pre allocate stock for a customer in S4Hana public cloud
entry.content:
How can we pre allocate stock for a specific customer before creating a sales order in SAP S4 public cloud? 

You have this requirement for a customer that does not allow partial delivery and it is a valuable customer for the company and hence you would like to pre allocate stock for some materials for this customer.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP WM Annual Physical Inventory creating only 1 PI doc with 800+ quants
entry.content:
Hi - I am using tcode LI01N (WM - not IM) to create a annual physical inventory (inventory method "ST") - I want to count one mixed use bin and am getting one pi doc (with 800+ quants)

In configuration we have  - Logistics Execution> Warehouse Management> Activities> Physical Inventory> Define Differences and Document Limits ...document items set to 100 (field MINPS). 

Anyone know what triggers LI01N to create multiple PI docs per MINPS like SAP help seems to indicate it will?

Janet

entry.title: ME2L not showing 2 deliveries on same PO
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I have a PO in ME23N that has 1 line of qty x, this qty is split into 2 seperate deliveries that make up total qty x. When I go into ME2L, I would expect to see the 2 lines correlating to the 2 seperate deliveries, but I only see one with the full amount. I'm probably not understanding something fundamental here but just wondering if anyone could help me to understand why this is the case. 

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Blocking Reason in LQ02
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have noticed that there is a "Blocking Reason" column in LQ02 and LX02 but it never seems to work. Is there any way for my warehouse to add this blocking reason when they move the stock from unrestricted to blocked?

 

Cheers.

entry.title: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single period
entry.content:
Hi,

For my customer I need to change the valuation class for a set of materials. Something has changed since I've done this a couple of years ago.

In the material master I now see several periods that have a valuation class field that can be changed. One on every tab for current period (6), previous period (5) and last period of previous fiscal year (12/2024)

The SAP help text still states to clear all stocks for current and previous period and mark the open PO's (and STO's) with a deletion indicator before you can make any changes.

I found out that if I delete the PO items and clear the stock for this period only I can change the valuation class of period 6. Because I did not clear the stock in period 5 it still gives me the error message and shows it has stock there.

Question to you all is: If I clear the stock for period 6, change the valuation class and put back the stock, what will happen when we go to period 7? Will SAP use the valuation class of period 6 as the new valuation class for period 7?

entry.title: Report for Custom MIRO
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly let me know if there is any Standard report for CUSTOM MIRO in s/4 HANA?
Please help with the steps..
